title: AI First Software QA Engineer
company_focus:
Cybersecurity, online privacy, identity protection and
financial wellness solutions for consumers
description:
About Gen:

Gen is a global company dedicated to powering Digital
Freedom through its trusted consumer brands including
Norton, Avast, LifeLock, MoneyLion and more. Our combined
heritage is rooted in financial empowerment and cyber safety
for the first digital generations, and today we deliver
award-winning cybersecurity, online privacy, identity
protection and financial wellness solutions to nearly 500
million users in more than 150 countries.

Together, we share a collective passion and vision to
protect consumers and help them grow, manage and secure
their digital and financial lives. We’re always looking for
smart, fearless and high-impact talent who see AI as a
teammate – leveraging it to move faster and deliver
meaningful results.

When you’re part of Gen, you’ll have the flexibility, tools
and support to do your best work and grow your career – from
flexible working options and time off to competitive pay,
benefits and well-being programs.

At Gen, we are scrappy and relentlessly customer driven. We
create room for healthy debate, experimentation and
continuous learning, and we seek out people with different
experiences, identities and ideas to join our team. You’ll
work with people who back each other, respect each other and
understand that our differences are a competitive advantage.

If this sounds like you, we’d love you to be part of Gen.


About the Role:

We are looking for a Software QA Engineer – Automation with
strong frontend and mobile focus, and a passion for building
reliable, high-speed, scalable quality systems using AI-
first practices.

This is an execution-focused role where you will design and
own automation frameworks across Web and Mobile platforms.
You will work closely with frontend (React/Web), Android,
and iOS engineers to drive release confidence, fast
regression cycles, and production-grade reliability.

We are looking for someone with strong ownership who
understands system internals, is comfortable with whitebox
testing, and can deeply troubleshoot issues using logs and
debugging tools.


Key Responsibilities:

Apply AI-assisted tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to
accelerate test design and improve coverage.

Design and maintain automation frameworks using Playwright,
Selenium, and Appium.

Write clean, maintainable automation code in Java, Kotlin,
JavaScript, or TypeScript.

Build fast, reliable, low-flakiness test suites integrated
into CI/CD pipelines.

Perform whitebox testing by understanding application flows,
business logic, and frontend–API interactions.

Troubleshoot complex UI and integration issues through
strong debugging and log analysis.

Collaborate closely with engineering teams to improve
testability, coverage, and overall release quality.


About you:

2 – 5 years of QA automation experience with frontend or
mobile focus.

Strong hands-on experience with Playwright and/or Selenium;
Appium for mobile automation.

Proficiency in Java, Kotlin, JavaScript, or TypeScript.

Comfortable with whitebox testing and reading code to
understand system behavior.

Excellent troubleshooting, debugging, and log analysis
skills.

Strong ownership mindset with focus on reliability, speed,
and quality outcomes.

Experience with CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, Jenkins,
TeamCity).

Exposure to AI-assisted development/testing tools is a plus.


Gen is an equal opportunity employer, and we’re committed to
fair, inclusive practices at every stage of the candidate
and employee journey. Employment decisions are based on
merit, experience and business needs. 

Gen is proud to be an equal-opportunity employer, committed
to diversity and inclusivity. We base employment decisions
on merit, experience, and business needs, without
considering race, color, national origin, age, religion,
sex, pregnancy, genetic information, disability, medical
condition, marital status, sexual orientation, gender
identity or expression, military or veteran status, or other
unlawful factors. Gen prohibits discrimination based on
these protected characteristics and recruits talented
candidates from diverse backgrounds.



We consider individuals with arrest and conviction records
and do not discriminate against employees for discussing
their own pay or that of other employees or applicants.
Learn more about pay transparency.



To conform to U.S. export control regulations, applicant
should be eligible for any required authorizations from the
U.S. Government.
responsibilities: Apply AI-assisted tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to accelerate test design and improve coverage
Design and maintain automation frameworks using Playwright, Selenium, and Appium
Write clean, maintainable automation code in Java, Kotlin, JavaScript, or TypeScript
Build fast, reliable, low-flakiness test suites integrated into CI/CD pipelines
Perform whitebox testing by understanding application flows, business logic, and frontend-API interactions
Troubleshoot complex UI and integration issues through debugging and log analysis
Collaborate closely with engineering teams to improve testability, coverage, and overall release quality
use_cases: Test automation for web and mobile applications
Quality assurance for cybersecurity and consumer protection products
Regression testing and release confidence for frontend and mobile platforms
CI/CD pipeline integration for automated testing
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a QA automation role that uses AI-assisted tools
like GitHub Copilot and Cursor to accelerate testing work,
but does not involve building, training, or deploying AI/ML
systems. The role focuses on test automation frameworks and
quality assurance for web and mobile platforms, with AI
tools being used to enhance productivity rather than working
directly on AI systems.
